title: Sanjay Gandhi National Park

overview.short: Sanjay Gandhi National Park is a 103.84 km2 (40.09 sq mi) national park in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with its headquarters situated in Borivali.
overview.description: Sanjay Gandhi National Park is a 103.84 km2 (40.09 sq mi) national park in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with its headquarters situated in Borivali. The national park attracts more than 2 million visitors every year.

topPlaces.name: Kashigaon
topPlaces.description: Kashigaon is a town located on Ghodbunder Road in Maharashtra, India. It is now part of Thane.

topPlaces.name: St. Jerome Church (Kashimira)
topPlaces.description: St. Jerome Church is a Roman Catholic Church in Kashimira, Mira-Bhayandar, India.

topPlaces.name: Miragaon metro station
topPlaces.description: Miragaon is an elevated metro station on the Red Line of the Mumbai Metro, located in Kashimira, Mira-Bhayandar, Maharashtra, India. The station is owned by the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) and was opened to the public on 7 April 2026 as part of Phase 1 of Line 9.

topPlaces.name: Pandurang Wadi metro station
topPlaces.description: Pandurangwadi is an elevated metro station on the Red Line of the Mumbai Metro, located in Pandurangwadi, Dahisar, Mumbai, India. The station is owned by the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) and was opened to the public on 7 April 2026 as part of Phase 1 of Line 9.

topPlaces.name: Kanheri Caves
topPlaces.description: The Kanheri Caves (KńĀnherńę-guhńĀ [kaňźn Īe…ĺiňź …°u…¶aňź]) are a group of caves and rock-cut monuments, cut into a massive basalt outcrop in the forests of the Sanjay Gandhi National Park, on the island of Salsette in the western outskirts of Mumbai, India. They contain Buddhist sculptures and relief carvings, paintings and inscriptions, dating from the 1st century CE to the 10th century CE. Kanheri comes from the Sanskrit Krishnagiri, which means "black mountain".

topPlaces.name: Kashigaon metro station
topPlaces.description: Kashigaon is an elevated metro station on the Red Line of the Mumbai Metro, located in Kashigaon, Mira-Bhayandar, Maharashtra, India. The station is owned by the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) and was opened to the public on 7 April 2026 as part of Phase 1 of Line 9.

topPlaces.name: Upvan Lake
topPlaces.description: Upvan (or Upavan) Lake is located in Thane in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is known for hosting the Sanskruti Arts Festival.

topPlaces.name: Dahisar East metro station
topPlaces.description: Dahisar (East) is an elevated metro station on the Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India, located on the Western Express Highway in northern Mumbai. It serves as the northern terminus of both the Yellow Line 2A and the Red Line 7, and as the southern terminus of Line 9, which extends the Red Line northward into Mira-Bhayandar.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sanjay Gandhi National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sanjay Gandhi National Park is Oct ‚Äď Mar. Summers are 26‚Äď40¬įC and winters are 12‚Äď28¬įC.

faq.q: How do I reach Sanjay Gandhi National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (19 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sanjay Gandhi National Park?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sanjay Gandhi National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sanjay Gandhi National Park?
